works: Feature-gated local flat scalar Avro file sources and local Avro sinks/fanout can run through sql-local-source-smoke and Python read_avro(...) or write_avro(...) with SourceState, output certificate, scoped binary sink preservation, and scoped typed decimal sink preservation evidence when built with --features universal-format-io.
blocked: Default binaries block Avro deterministically. Broad Avro schema evolution, logical-type completeness beyond admitted flat scalar rows, Vortex-native output equivalence, object-store/table/runtime claims, and production support remain blocked.
